productDisplayName: Peter England Men Formal Tan Belt
description: A formal essential, the belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. peter england perfects this traditional accessory's foray into  modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with formal trousers, formal shoes and crisp full-sleeved shirts. Length:95 cmMade of genuine leather Tang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeWash careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
